message:
fix: rustfmt normalization and contract test improvements

robot_types: collapse multi-line assert chains to single lines.
runtime_compat: minor formatting fix.
codec/lib.rs: reformat test assertions and imports.
mux/events.rs: minor formatting.

vendored contract tests: improve v27 drift test to count dispositions
from SURFACE_CONTRACT_V1 directly, add exhaustive disposition coverage
assertions, strengthen behavioral and integration tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
